data.title: Stablecoins will soon have its 'iPhone moment': Circle CEO
data.description:
The CEO of Circle, which recently debuted on the New York Stock Exchange, predicts it won’t be long before stablecoins reach the level of developer attraction that the iPhone achieved.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/stablecoin-adoption-iphone-moment-incoming-circle-ceo-jeremy-allaire?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Circle CEO Highlights Stablecoins as Highly Effective Currency
data.description: According to PANews, Circle CEO Jeremy Allaire recently emphasized on the X platform that stablecoins represent the most effective form of currency ever created. He noted that the industry has not yet reached its 'iPhone moment,' a time when developers worldwide will recognize the power and opportunities of programmable digital currency on the internet, akin to the realization of programmable mobile devices. Allaire expressed confidence that this moment is approaching soon.

data.title: Bitget Onchain launches FartCat, drip, and BORDERS tokens
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Bitget Onchain Trading (Onchain) has launched the MEME tokens FartCat, drip, BORDERS, and 79th of the Solana and BNB Smart Chain ecosystems. Users can start trading in the onchain trading section.

Bitget Onchain Trading (Onchain) aims to seamlessly connect CEX and DEX to provide users with a more convenient, efficient, and secure onchain trading experience. Users can directly use Bitget spot accounts (USDT/USDC) to trade popular assets on the chain. Currently, popular public chains such as Solana (SOL), BNB Smart Chain (BSC), and Base are supported.

data.title: Planet Lunch News
Bybit CEO: Byreal, the first on-chain DEX incubated by Bybit, will be launched at the end of the month
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Bybit CEO Ben Zhou posted on the X platform, "Byreal, the first on-chain DEX incubated by Bybit, will be launched at the end of this month. It started from scratch and was born in the Solana ecosystem. The special thing is: 1/ CEX + DEX synergy. Byreal is not just "another DEX". It combines CEX-level liquidity with DeFi native transparency. This is true hybrid finance. More Cex + Dex projects are coming soon in the future. 2/ Unified liquidity and speed adopt RFQ + CLMM routing design. Byreal will provide users with low slippage, MEV-protected Swap transactions at extraordinary speeds."

data.title: Israel strikes Iran’s major gas field, threatening the energy markets
data.description:
A new wave of conflict in the Middle East spilled into Iran’s energy sector over the weekend, as Israel launched an attack on a major gas facility connected to Iran’s largest natural gas field. On Saturday, an Israeli strike hit the Phase 14 processing plant of the South Pars gas field, causing a major explosion […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/israel-attacks-iran-gas-fields/

data.title: Trump: US had nothing to do with attack on Iran
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Trump posted on TruthSocial that "the United States had nothing to do with the attack on Iran tonight (Saturday local time). If we are attacked by Iran in any way, the U.S. armed forces will go all out on an unprecedented scale. However, we can easily reach an agreement between Iran and Israel to end this bloody conflict."
